description_long: This house is a modern, expansive residential property featuring a symmetrical layout with two large blue-tiled swimming pools at the front, separated by a wide staircase and flanked by palm trees and manicured lawns. The central structure is set back, with a prominent entryway and a series of flat-roofed, white buildings that include multiple outdoor seating areas and shaded pavilions. The property is enclosed by a low white wall, and the grounds are adorned with fountains, planters, and decorative landscaping. To one side, there are two blue-roofed gazebos and a driveway area, while the opposite side features a small garden with trees and benches. The overall design emphasizes open space, luxury, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living. The architectural style is distinctly modern, with clean lines, flat surfaces, and a focus on symmetry and outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, luxurious house with two large front pools, palm trees, white flat-roofed buildings, and extensive landscaped grounds. The design features symmetry, open spaces, and multiple outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two blue pools, central staircase, palm trees, and the main entryway set back behind the pools.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue-roofed gazebos, driveway area, and the depth of the property with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical layout, fountains, and the arrangement of white buildings and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden area with trees and benches, as well as the rear of the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Wide central entry with steps, no porch, flanked by planters and palm trees, minimalistic modern door
